    60→commits/:
    61→    commit files.
    62→
    63→========================================
    64→3. Custom Hash Algorithm (MANDATORY)
    65→========================================
    66→
    67→You MUST implement the following custom hash function.
    68→
    69→Name: MiniHash
    70→
    71→Input: raw bytes of file
    72→Output: 16-character lowercase hexadecimal string
    73→
    74→Algorithm:
    75→
    76→1. Initialize:
    77→    h = 1469598103934665603  (64-bit unsigned integer)
    78→
    79→2. For each byte b:
    80→    h = h XOR b
    81→    h = (h * 1099511628211) mod 2^64
    82→
    83→3. After processing all bytes:
    84→    return lower 64 bits of h
    85→    formatted as 16-character zero-padded lowercase hex
    86→
    87→This is NOT SHA.
    88→No crypto libraries allowed.
    89→
    90→The exact algorithm must match this definition.
    91→
    92→========================================
    93→4. Command Specifications
    94→========================================
    95→
    96→----------------------------------------
    97→4.1 init
    98→----------------------------------------
    99→
   100→Create .minigit structure.

   102→If already exists:
   103→    print "Repository already initialized"

   105→
   106→----------------------------------------
   107→4.2 add <file>
   108→----------------------------------------
   109→
   110→If file missing:
   111→    print "File not found"
   112→    exit 1
   113→
   114→Compute MiniHash on file content.
   115→
   116→Store blob at:
   117→    .minigit/objects/<hash>
   118→
   119→Append filename to index if not already present.
   120→
   121→----------------------------------------
   122→4.3 commit -m "<message>"
   123→----------------------------------------
   124→
   125→If index empty:
   126→    print "Nothing to commit"
   127→    exit 1
   128→
   129→Commit format (exact text):
   130→
   131→parent: <parent_hash or NONE>
   132→timestamp: <unix_epoch_integer>
   133→message: <message>
   134→files:
   135→<filename> <blobhash>
   136→<filename> <blobhash>
   137→
   138→Rules:
   139→- filenames sorted lexicographically
   140→- parent = HEAD or NONE
   141→- commit hash = MiniHash of full commit content
   142→- write commit file:
   143→      .minigit/commits/<commit_hash>
   144→- update HEAD
   145→- clear index
   146→
   147→Print:
   148→    Committed <commit_hash>
   149→
   150→----------------------------------------
   151→4.4 status
   152→----------------------------------------
   153→

   155→
   156→Staged files:
   157→<file1>
   158→<file2>
   159→

   161→

   163→(none)
   164→
   165→----------------------------------------
   166→4.5 log
   167→----------------------------------------

   169→If no commits:
   170→    print "No commits"
   171→
   172→Else traverse parents:
   173→
   174→commit <hash>
   175→Date: <timestamp>
   176→Message: <message>
   177→
   178→----------------------------------------
   179→4.6 diff <commit1> <commit2>
   180→----------------------------------------
   181→
   182→Compare file lists by blob hash.
   183→
   184→For each difference:
   185→
   186→Added: <filename>
   187→Removed: <filename>
   188→Modified: <filename>
   189→
   190→If commit missing:
   191→    print "Invalid commit"
   192→    exit 1
   193→
   194→----------------------------------------
   195→4.7 checkout <commit_hash>

   197→
   198→If commit does not exist:
   199→    print "Invalid commit"
   200→    exit 1
   201→
   202→Steps:
   203→1. Read the commit file from .minigit/commits/<commit_hash>
   204→2. Parse the files section to get each filename and blob hash
   205→3. For each file in the commit:
   206→   - Read the blob content from .minigit/objects/<blob_hash>

   210→

   213→
   214→----------------------------------------

   216→----------------------------------------
   217→

   220→    exit 1
   221→
   222→Steps:
   223→1. Update HEAD to <commit_hash>
   224→2. Clear the index file
   225→3. Do NOT modify any working directory files
   226→
   227→Print:
   228→    Reset to <commit_hash>
   229→
   230→----------------------------------------
   231→4.9 rm <file>
   232→----------------------------------------
   233→
   234→Remove a file from the staging index.
   235→
   236→If the file is not in the index:
   237→    print "File not in index"
   238→    exit 1
   239→
   240→Remove the filename from the index file.
   241→
   242→----------------------------------------
   243→4.10 show <commit_hash>
   244→----------------------------------------
   245→
   246→If commit does not exist:
   247→    print "Invalid commit"
   248→    exit 1
   249→

   251→
   252→commit <commit_hash>
   253→Date: <timestamp>
   254→Message: <message>
   255→Files:
   256→  <filename> <blobhash>
   257→  <filename> <blobhash>
   258→
   259→Files are listed with two-space indent, sorted lexicographically.
   260→
   261→========================================
   262→5. Determinism Rules
   263→========================================
   264→
   265→- Sort filenames
   266→- No extra spaces
   267→- No debug output
   268→- Exact string matching required

file.content:
MiniGit Specification
Version: 2.0
Command name: minigit
External libraries: NOT allowed
Standard library: Allowed
Persistent storage: Local filesystem only

========================================
1. Overview
========================================

MiniGit is a minimal version control system.

The executable must be called:

    minigit

All repository data must be stored in:

    .minigit/

All commands operate relative to current directory.

----------------------------------------

Supported commands:

    minigit init
    minigit add <file>
    minigit commit -m "<message>"
    minigit status
    minigit log
    minigit diff <commit1> <commit2>
    minigit checkout <commit_hash>
    minigit reset <commit_hash>
    minigit rm <file>
    minigit show <commit_hash>

========================================
2. Repository Structure
========================================

After init:

    .minigit/
        objects/
        commits/
        index
        HEAD

HEAD:
    latest commit hash or empty.

index:
    staged filenames (one per line).

objects/:
    blob storage.

commits/:
    commit files.

========================================
3. Custom Hash Algorithm (MANDATORY)
========================================

You MUST implement the following custom hash function.

Name: MiniHash

Input: raw bytes of file
Output: 16-character lowercase hexadecimal string

Algorithm:

1. Initialize:
    h = 1469598103934665603  (64-bit unsigned integer)

2. For each byte b:
    h = h XOR b
    h = (h * 1099511628211) mod 2^64

3. After processing all bytes:
    return lower 64 bits of h
    formatted as 16-character zero-padded lowercase hex

This is NOT SHA.
No crypto libraries allowed.

The exact algorithm must match this definition.

========================================
4. Command Specifications
========================================

----------------------------------------
4.1 init
----------------------------------------

Create .minigit structure.

If already exists:
    print "Repository already initialized"
Exit 0.

----------------------------------------
4.2 add <file>
----------------------------------------

If file missing:
    print "File not found"
    exit 1

Compute MiniHash on file content.

Store blob at:
    .minigit/objects/<hash>

Append filename to index if not already present.

----------------------------------------
4.3 commit -m "<message>"
----------------------------------------

If index empty:
    print "Nothing to commit"
    exit 1

Commit format (exact text):

parent: <parent_hash or NONE>
timestamp: <unix_epoch_integer>
message: <message>
files:
<filename> <blobhash>
<filename> <blobhash>

Rules:
- filenames sorted lexicographically
- parent = HEAD or NONE
- commit hash = MiniHash of full commit content
- write commit file:
      .minigit/commits/<commit_hash>
- update HEAD
- clear index

Print:
    Committed <commit_hash>

----------------------------------------
4.4 status
----------------------------------------

Output exactly:

Staged files:
<file1>
<file2>

If none:

Staged files:
(none)

----------------------------------------
4.5 log
----------------------------------------

If no commits:
    print "No commits"

Else traverse parents:

commit <hash>
Date: <timestamp>
Message: <message>

----------------------------------------
4.6 diff <commit1> <commit2>
----------------------------------------

Compare file lists by blob hash.

For each difference:

Added: <filename>
Removed: <filename>
Modified: <filename>

If commit missing:
    print "Invalid commit"
    exit 1

----------------------------------------
4.7 checkout <commit_hash>
----------------------------------------

If commit does not exist:
    print "Invalid commit"
    exit 1

Steps:
1. Read the commit file from .minigit/commits/<commit_hash>
2. Parse the files section to get each filename and blob hash
3. For each file in the commit:
   - Read the blob content from .minigit/objects/<blob_hash>
   - Write the content to the working directory file
4. Update HEAD to <commit_hash>
5. Clear the index file

Print:
    Checked out <commit_hash>

----------------------------------------
4.8 reset <commit_hash>
----------------------------------------

If commit does not exist:
    print "Invalid commit"
    exit 1

Steps:
1. Update HEAD to <commit_hash>
2. Clear the index file
3. Do NOT modify any working directory files

Print:
    Reset to <commit_hash>

----------------------------------------
4.9 rm <file>
----------------------------------------

Remove a file from the staging index.

If the file is not in the index:
    print "File not in index"
    exit 1

Remove the filename from the index file.

----------------------------------------
4.10 show <commit_hash>
----------------------------------------

If commit does not exist:
    print "Invalid commit"
    exit 1

Output exactly:

commit <commit_hash>
Date: <timestamp>
Message: <message>
Files:
  <filename> <blobhash>
  <filename> <blobhash>

Files are listed with two-space indent, sorted lexicographically.

========================================
5. Determinism Rules
========================================

- Sort filenames
- No extra spaces
- No debug output
- Exact string matching required

========================================
END
========================================

     2→

     4→import sys

     7→

     9→    """Compute MiniHash (FNV-1a variant, 64-bit, 16-char hex)."""
    10→    h: int = 1469598103934665603
    11→    mod: int = 2**64
    12→    for b in data:
    13→        h ^= b
    14→        h = (h * 1099511628211) % mod
    15→    return format(h, "016x")
    16→
    17→

    19→    """Return path to .minigit directory."""
    20→    return os.path.join(os.getcwd(), ".minigit")

    22→
    23→def cmd_init() -> None:
    24→    """Initialize a new repository."""
    25→    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    26→    if os.path.isdir(mgdir):
    27→        print("Repository already initialized")
    28→        return
    29→    os.makedirs(os.path.join(mgdir, "objects"))

    31→    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "index"), "w") as f:
    32→        f.write("")

    34→        f.write("")
    35→
    36→

    39→    if not os.path.isfile(filename):
    40→        print("File not found")
    41→        sys.exit(1)
    42→
    43→    with open(filename, "rb") as f:
    44→        content: bytes = f.read()
    45→

    48→    with open(obj_path, "wb") as f:
    49→        f.write(content)
    50→

    57→        existing.append(filename)

    59→            for name in existing:
    60→                f.write(name + "\n")
    61→
    62→
    63→def cmd_commit(message: str) -> None:
    64→    """Create a commit."""
    65→    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    66→    index_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "index")
    67→
    68→    with open(index_path, "r") as f:
    69→        staged: list[str] = [line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]
    70→
    71→    if not staged:
    72→        print("Nothing to commit")
    73→        sys.exit(1)
    74→
    75→    head_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD")
    76→    with open(head_path, "r") as f:
    77→        parent: str = f.read().strip()

    79→    parent_str: str = parent if parent else "NONE"
    80→
    81→    timestamp = int(time.time())
    82→

    86→            content: bytes = f.read()

    88→        file_entries.append(f"{fname} {h}")
    89→
    90→    commit_content: str = (
    91→        f"parent: {parent_str}\n"
    92→        f"timestamp: {timestamp}\n"
    93→        f"message: {message}\n"

    95→    )
    96→    for entry in file_entries:
    97→        commit_content += entry + "\n"
    98→
    99→    commit_hash: str = minihash(commit_content.encode())
   100→
   101→    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", commit_hash), "w") as f:
   102→        f.write(commit_content)
   103→
   104→    with open(head_path, "w") as f:
   105→        f.write(commit_hash)
   106→
   107→    with open(index_path, "w") as f:

   112→
   113→def cmd_log() -> None:

   116→    head_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD")

   118→    with open(head_path, "r") as f:
   119→        current: str = f.read().strip()

   122→        print("No commits")

   124→
   125→    first: bool = True
   126→    while current:

   128→        with open(commit_path, "r") as f:
   129→            lines: list[str] = f.readlines()
   130→

   132→        timestamp: str = ""
   133→        message: str = ""
   134→        for line in lines:
   135→            line_s: str = line.strip()
   136→            if line_s.startswith("parent: "):
   137→                parent = line_s[len("parent: "):]

   139→                timestamp = line_s[len("timestamp: "):]
   140→            elif line_s.startswith("message: "):
   141→                message = line_s[len("message: "):]
   142→
   143→        if not first:
   144→            print()
   145→        first = False
   146→
   147→        print(f"commit {current}")
   148→        print(f"Date: {timestamp}")
   149→        print(f"Message: {message}")
   150→
   151→        if parent == "NONE":
   152→            current = ""
   153→        else:
   154→            current = parent
   155→
   156→
   157→def main() -> None:
   158→    """Entry point."""
   159→    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
   160→        print("Usage: minigit <command>")
   161→        sys.exit(1)
   162→
   163→    command: str = sys.argv[1]
   164→
   165→    if command == "init":
   166→        cmd_init()
   167→    elif command == "add":
   168→        if len(sys.argv) < 3:
   169→            print("Usage: minigit add <file>")
   170→            sys.exit(1)
   171→        cmd_add(sys.argv[2])
   172→    elif command == "commit":
   173→        if len(sys.argv) < 4 or sys.argv[2] != "-m":
   174→            print("Usage: minigit commit -m <message>")
   175→            sys.exit(1)
   176→        cmd_commit(sys.argv[3])
   177→    elif command == "log":
   178→        cmd_log()
   179→    else:
   180→        print(f"Unknown command: {command}")
   181→        sys.exit(1)
   182→
   183→
   184→if __name__ == "__main__":
   185→    main()

file.content:
"""MiniGit: A minimal version control system."""

import os
import sys
import time


def minihash(data: bytes) -> str:
    """Compute MiniHash (FNV-1a variant, 64-bit, 16-char hex)."""
    h: int = 1469598103934665603
    mod: int = 2**64
    for b in data:
        h ^= b
        h = (h * 1099511628211) % mod
    return format(h, "016x")


def get_minigit_dir() -> str:
    """Return path to .minigit directory."""
    return os.path.join(os.getcwd(), ".minigit")


def cmd_init() -> None:
    """Initialize a new repository."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    if os.path.isdir(mgdir):
        print("Repository already initialized")
        return
    os.makedirs(os.path.join(mgdir, "objects"))
    os.makedirs(os.path.join(mgdir, "commits"))
    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "index"), "w") as f:
        f.write("")
    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD"), "w") as f:
        f.write("")


def cmd_add(filename: str) -> None:
    """Stage a file."""
    if not os.path.isfile(filename):
        print("File not found")
        sys.exit(1)

    with open(filename, "rb") as f:
        content: bytes = f.read()

    h: str = minihash(content)
    obj_path: str = os.path.join(get_minigit_dir(), "objects", h)
    with open(obj_path, "wb") as f:
        f.write(content)

    index_path: str = os.path.join(get_minigit_dir(), "index")
    existing: list[str] = []
    with open(index_path, "r") as f:
        existing = [line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]

    if filename not in existing:
        existing.append(filename)
        with open(index_path, "w") as f:
            for name in existing:
                f.write(name + "\n")


def cmd_commit(message: str) -> None:
    """Create a commit."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    index_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "index")

    with open(index_path, "r") as f:
        staged: list[str] = [line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]

    if not staged:
        print("Nothing to commit")
        sys.exit(1)

    head_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD")
    with open(head_path, "r") as f:
        parent: str = f.read().strip()

    parent_str: str = parent if parent else "NONE"

    timestamp = int(time.time())

    file_entries: list[str] = []
    for fname in sorted(staged):
        with open(fname, "rb") as f:
            content: bytes = f.read()
        h: str = minihash(content)
        file_entries.append(f"{fname} {h}")

    commit_content: str = (
        f"parent: {parent_str}\n"
        f"timestamp: {timestamp}\n"
        f"message: {message}\n"
        f"files:\n"
    )
    for entry in file_entries:
        commit_content += entry + "\n"

    commit_hash: str = minihash(commit_content.encode())

    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", commit_hash), "w") as f:
        f.write(commit_content)

    with open(head_path, "w") as f:
        f.write(commit_hash)

    with open(index_path, "w") as f:
        f.write("")

    print(f"Committed {commit_hash}")


def cmd_log() -> None:
    """Show commit log."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    head_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD")

    with open(head_path, "r") as f:
        current: str = f.read().strip()

    if not current:
        print("No commits")
        return

    first: bool = True
    while current:
        commit_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", current)
        with open(commit_path, "r") as f:
            lines: list[str] = f.readlines()

        parent: str = ""
        timestamp: str = ""
        message: str = ""
        for line in lines:
            line_s: str = line.strip()
            if line_s.startswith("parent: "):
                parent = line_s[len("parent: "):]
            elif line_s.startswith("timestamp: "):
                timestamp = line_s[len("timestamp: "):]
            elif line_s.startswith("message: "):
                message = line_s[len("message: "):]

        if not first:
            print()
        first = False

        print(f"commit {current}")
        print(f"Date: {timestamp}")
        print(f"Message: {message}")

        if parent == "NONE":
            current = ""
        else:
            current = parent


def main() -> None:
    """Entry point."""
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print("Usage: minigit <command>")
        sys.exit(1)

    command: str = sys.argv[1]

    if command == "init":
        cmd_init()
    elif command == "add":
        if len(sys.argv) < 3:
            print("Usage: minigit add <file>")
            sys.exit(1)
        cmd_add(sys.argv[2])
    elif command == "commit":
        if len(sys.argv) < 4 or sys.argv[2] != "-m":
            print("Usage: minigit commit -m <message>")

    else:
        print(f"Unknown command: {command}")
        sys.exit(1)

def cmd_status() -> None:
    """Show staged files."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    index_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "index")

    with open(index_path, "r") as f:
        staged: list[str] = [line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]

    print("Staged files:")
    if staged:
        for name in staged:
            print(name)
    else:
        print("(none)")


def cmd_log() -> None:
    """Show commit log."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    head_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD")

    with open(head_path, "r") as f:
        current: str = f.read().strip()

    if not current:
        print("No commits")
        return

    first: bool = True
    while current:
        commit_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", current)
        with open(commit_path, "r") as f:
            lines: list[str] = f.readlines()

        parent: str = ""
        timestamp: str = ""
        message: str = ""
        for line in lines:
            line_s: str = line.strip()
            if line_s.startswith("parent: "):
                parent = line_s[len("parent: "):]
            elif line_s.startswith("timestamp: "):
                timestamp = line_s[len("timestamp: "):]
            elif line_s.startswith("message: "):
                message = line_s[len("message: "):]

        if not first:
            print()
        first = False

        print(f"commit {current}")
        print(f"Date: {timestamp}")
        print(f"Message: {message}")

        if parent == "NONE":
            current = ""
        else:
            current = parent


def parse_commit_files(commit_hash: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    """Parse a commit file and return a dict of filename -> blob hash."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    commit_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", commit_hash)

    if not os.path.isfile(commit_path):
        print("Invalid commit")
        sys.exit(1)

    with open(commit_path, "r") as f:
        content: str = f.read()

    files: dict[str, str] = {}
    in_files: bool = False
    for line in content.splitlines():
        if line == "files:":
            in_files = True
            continue
        if in_files and line.strip():
            parts: list[str] = line.strip().split(" ", 1)
            if len(parts) == 2:
                files[parts[0]] = parts[1]
    return files


def parse_commit_metadata(commit_hash: str) -> tuple[str, str, str]:
    """Parse commit and return (parent, timestamp, message)."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    commit_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", commit_hash)

    if not os.path.isfile(commit_path):
        print("Invalid commit")
        sys.exit(1)

    with open(commit_path, "r") as f:
        lines: list[str] = f.readlines()

    parent: str = ""
    timestamp: str = ""
    message: str = ""
    for line in lines:
        line_s: str = line.strip()
        if line_s.startswith("parent: "):
            parent = line_s[len("parent: "):]
        elif line_s.startswith("timestamp: "):
            timestamp = line_s[len("timestamp: "):]
        elif line_s.startswith("message: "):
            message = line_s[len("message: "):]
    return parent, timestamp, message


def cmd_diff(commit1: str, commit2: str) -> None:
    """Compare two commits."""
    files1: dict[str, str] = parse_commit_files(commit1)
    files2: dict[str, str] = parse_commit_files(commit2)

    all_files: list[str] = sorted(set(list(files1.keys()) + list(files2.keys())))

    for fname in all_files:
        if fname not in files1:
            print(f"Added: {fname}")
        elif fname not in files2:
            print(f"Removed: {fname}")
        elif files1[fname] != files2[fname]:
            print(f"Modified: {fname}")


def cmd_checkout(commit_hash: str) -> None:
    """Checkout a commit."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    commit_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", commit_hash)

    if not os.path.isfile(commit_path):
        print("Invalid commit")
        sys.exit(1)

    files: dict[str, str] = parse_commit_files(commit_hash)

    for fname in sorted(files.keys()):
        blob_hash: str = files[fname]
        blob_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "objects", blob_hash)
        with open(blob_path, "rb") as f:
            content: bytes = f.read()
        with open(fname, "wb") as f:
            f.write(content)

    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD"), "w") as f:
        f.write(commit_hash)

    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "index"), "w") as f:
        f.write("")

    print(f"Checked out {commit_hash}")


def cmd_reset(commit_hash: str) -> None:
    """Reset HEAD to a commit."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    commit_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", commit_hash)

    if not os.path.isfile(commit_path):
        print("Invalid commit")
        sys.exit(1)

    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD"), "w") as f:
        f.write(commit_hash)

    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "index"), "w") as f:
        f.write("")

    print(f"Reset to {commit_hash}")


def cmd_rm(filename: str) -> None:
    """Remove a file from the index."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    index_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "index")

    with open(index_path, "r") as f:
        staged: list[str] = [line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]

    if filename not in staged:
        print("File not in index")
        sys.exit(1)

    staged.remove(filename)
    with open(index_path, "w") as f:
        for name in staged:
            f.write(name + "\n")


def cmd_show(commit_hash: str) -> None:
    """Show details of a commit."""
    parent: str
    timestamp: str
    message: str
    parent, timestamp, message = parse_commit_metadata(commit_hash)
    files: dict[str, str] = parse_commit_files(commit_hash)

    print(f"commit {commit_hash}")
    print(f"Date: {timestamp}")
    print(f"Message: {message}")
    print("Files:")
    for fname in sorted(files.keys()):
        print(f"  {fname} {files[fname]}")


def main() -> None:

tool_use_result.originalFile:
"""MiniGit: A minimal version control system."""

import os
import sys
import time


def minihash(data: bytes) -> str:
    """Compute MiniHash (FNV-1a variant, 64-bit, 16-char hex)."""
    h: int = 1469598103934665603
    mod: int = 2**64
    for b in data:
        h ^= b
        h = (h * 1099511628211) % mod
    return format(h, "016x")


def get_minigit_dir() -> str:
    """Return path to .minigit directory."""
    return os.path.join(os.getcwd(), ".minigit")


def cmd_init() -> None:
    """Initialize a new repository."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    if os.path.isdir(mgdir):
        print("Repository already initialized")
        return
    os.makedirs(os.path.join(mgdir, "objects"))
    os.makedirs(os.path.join(mgdir, "commits"))
    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "index"), "w") as f:
        f.write("")
    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD"), "w") as f:
        f.write("")


def cmd_add(filename: str) -> None:
    """Stage a file."""
    if not os.path.isfile(filename):
        print("File not found")
        sys.exit(1)

    with open(filename, "rb") as f:
        content: bytes = f.read()

    h: str = minihash(content)
    obj_path: str = os.path.join(get_minigit_dir(), "objects", h)
    with open(obj_path, "wb") as f:
        f.write(content)

    index_path: str = os.path.join(get_minigit_dir(), "index")
    existing: list[str] = []
    with open(index_path, "r") as f:
        existing = [line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]

    if filename not in existing:
        existing.append(filename)
        with open(index_path, "w") as f:
            for name in existing:
                f.write(name + "\n")


def cmd_commit(message: str) -> None:
    """Create a commit."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    index_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "index")

    with open(index_path, "r") as f:
        staged: list[str] = [line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]

    if not staged:
        print("Nothing to commit")
        sys.exit(1)

    head_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD")
    with open(head_path, "r") as f:
        parent: str = f.read().strip()

    parent_str: str = parent if parent else "NONE"

    timestamp = int(time.time())

    file_entries: list[str] = []
    for fname in sorted(staged):
        with open(fname, "rb") as f:
            content: bytes = f.read()
        h: str = minihash(content)
        file_entries.append(f"{fname} {h}")

    commit_content: str = (
        f"parent: {parent_str}\n"
        f"timestamp: {timestamp}\n"
        f"message: {message}\n"
        f"files:\n"
    )
    for entry in file_entries:
        commit_content += entry + "\n"

    commit_hash: str = minihash(commit_content.encode())

    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", commit_hash), "w") as f:
        f.write(commit_content)

    with open(head_path, "w") as f:
        f.write(commit_hash)

    with open(index_path, "w") as f:
        f.write("")

    print(f"Committed {commit_hash}")


def cmd_log() -> None:
    """Show commit log."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    head_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD")

    with open(head_path, "r") as f:
        current: str = f.read().strip()

    if not current:
        print("No commits")
        return

    first: bool = True
    while current:
        commit_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", current)
        with open(commit_path, "r") as f:
            lines: list[str] = f.readlines()

        parent: str = ""
        timestamp: str = ""
        message: str = ""
        for line in lines:
            line_s: str = line.strip()
            if line_s.startswith("parent: "):
                parent = line_s[len("parent: "):]
            elif line_s.startswith("timestamp: "):
                timestamp = line_s[len("timestamp: "):]
            elif line_s.startswith("message: "):
                message = line_s[len("message: "):]

        if not first:
            print()
        first = False

        print(f"commit {current}")
        print(f"Date: {timestamp}")
        print(f"Message: {message}")

        if parent == "NONE":
            current = ""
        else:
            current = parent


def main() -> None:
    """Entry point."""
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print("Usage: minigit <command>")
        sys.exit(1)

    command: str = sys.argv[1]

    if command == "init":
        cmd_init()
    elif command == "add":
        if len(sys.argv) < 3:
            print("Usage: minigit add <file>")
            sys.exit(1)
        cmd_add(sys.argv[2])
    elif command == "commit":
        if len(sys.argv) < 4 or sys.argv[2] != "-m":
            print("Usage: minigit commit -m <message>")
            sys.exit(1)
        cmd_commit(sys.argv[3])
    elif command == "log":
        cmd_log()
    else:
        print(f"Unknown command: {command}")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

        print(f"commit {current}")
        print(f"Date: {timestamp}")
        print(f"Message: {message}")

        if parent == "NONE":
            current = ""
        else:
            current = parent


def parse_commit_files(commit_hash: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    """Parse a commit file and return a dict of filename -> blob hash."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    commit_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", commit_hash)

    if not os.path.isfile(commit_path):
        print("Invalid commit")
        sys.exit(1)

    with open(commit_path, "r") as f:
        content: str = f.read()

    files: dict[str, str] = {}
    in_files: bool = False
    for line in content.splitlines():
        if line == "files:":
            in_files = True
            continue
        if in_files and line.strip():
            parts: list[str] = line.strip().split(" ", 1)
            if len(parts) == 2:
                files[parts[0]] = parts[1]
    return files


def parse_commit_metadata(commit_hash: str) -> tuple[str, str, str]:
    """Parse commit and return (parent, timestamp, message)."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    commit_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", commit_hash)

    if not os.path.isfile(commit_path):
        print("Invalid commit")
        sys.exit(1)

    with open(commit_path, "r") as f:
        lines: list[str] = f.readlines()

    parent: str = ""
    timestamp: str = ""
    message: str = ""
    for line in lines:
        line_s: str = line.strip()
        if line_s.startswith("parent: "):
            parent = line_s[len("parent: "):]
        elif line_s.startswith("timestamp: "):
            timestamp = line_s[len("timestamp: "):]
        elif line_s.startswith("message: "):
            message = line_s[len("message: "):]
    return parent, timestamp, message


def cmd_diff(commit1: str, commit2: str) -> None:
    """Compare two commits."""
    files1: dict[str, str] = parse_commit_files(commit1)
    files2: dict[str, str] = parse_commit_files(commit2)

    all_files: list[str] = sorted(set(list(files1.keys()) + list(files2.keys())))

    for fname in all_files:
        if fname not in files1:
            print(f"Added: {fname}")
        elif fname not in files2:
            print(f"Removed: {fname}")
        elif files1[fname] != files2[fname]:
            print(f"Modified: {fname}")


def cmd_checkout(commit_hash: str) -> None:
    """Checkout a commit."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    commit_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", commit_hash)

    if not os.path.isfile(commit_path):
        print("Invalid commit")
        sys.exit(1)

    files: dict[str, str] = parse_commit_files(commit_hash)

    for fname in sorted(files.keys()):
        blob_hash: str = files[fname]
        blob_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "objects", blob_hash)
        with open(blob_path, "rb") as f:
            content: bytes = f.read()
        with open(fname, "wb") as f:
            f.write(content)

    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD"), "w") as f:
        f.write(commit_hash)

    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "index"), "w") as f:
        f.write("")

    print(f"Checked out {commit_hash}")


def cmd_reset(commit_hash: str) -> None:
    """Reset HEAD to a commit."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    commit_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "commits", commit_hash)

    if not os.path.isfile(commit_path):
        print("Invalid commit")
        sys.exit(1)

    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "HEAD"), "w") as f:
        f.write(commit_hash)

    with open(os.path.join(mgdir, "index"), "w") as f:
        f.write("")

    print(f"Reset to {commit_hash}")


def cmd_rm(filename: str) -> None:
    """Remove a file from the index."""
    mgdir: str = get_minigit_dir()
    index_path: str = os.path.join(mgdir, "index")

    with open(index_path, "r") as f:
        staged: list[str] = [line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]

    if filename not in staged:
        print("File not in index")
        sys.exit(1)

    staged.remove(filename)
    with open(index_path, "w") as f:
        for name in staged:
            f.write(name + "\n")


def cmd_show(commit_hash: str) -> None:
    """Show details of a commit."""
    parent: str
    timestamp: str
    message: str
    parent, timestamp, message = parse_commit_metadata(commit_hash)
    files: dict[str, str] = parse_commit_files(commit_hash)

    print(f"commit {commit_hash}")
    print(f"Date: {timestamp}")
    print(f"Message: {message}")
    print("Files:")
    for fname in sorted(files.keys()):
        print(f"  {fname} {files[fname]}")


def main() -> None:
    """Entry point."""
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print("Usage: minigit <command>")
        sys.exit(1)

    command: str = sys.argv[1]

    if command == "init":
        cmd_init()
    elif command == "add":
        if len(sys.argv) < 3:
            print("Usage: minigit add <file>")
            sys.exit(1)
        cmd_add(sys.argv[2])
    elif command == "commit":
        if len(sys.argv) < 4 or sys.argv[2] != "-m":
            print("Usage: minigit commit -m <message>")
            sys.exit(1)
        cmd_commit(sys.argv[3])
    elif command == "log":
        cmd_log()
    else:
        print(f"Unknown command: {command}")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
